description.value: You're used to threats coming out of nowhere, and you react by thinking very quickly. Attempt up to three @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] checks. If you have any special abilities or free actions that would normally be triggered when you Recall Knowledge, you can't use them for these actions. At 13th level, you can instead attempt up to four Recall Knowledge checks. At 17th level, you can instead attempt up to five Recall Knowledge checks.
